_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative Analysis Identifies Candidate Tumor Microenvironment and Intracellular Signaling Pathways that Define Tumor Heterogeneity in NF1.

_contextSnippet: The results from MCP-counter... show a complementary view of the tumor cell types... we found the presence of cancer-associated fibroblasts across all tumors that were not captured in CIBERSORT
details: Provided complementary tumor cell type analysis and identified presence of cancer-associated fibroblasts across all tumors that were not captured in CIBERSORT
